tasks.label: Setup Ghidra
tasks.command: python "${workspaceFolder}/scripts/setup/install-ghidra.py" && uv pip install --no-index -f "${workspaceFolder}/.tools/ghidra/Ghidra/Features/PyGhidra/pypkg/dist" pyghidra && uv pip install --no-index -f "${workspaceFolder}/.tools/ghidra/docs/ghidra_stubs" ghidra-stubs
